page_content:
Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Anthropology department; and must

be in Anthropology program; and must be admitted to University Honors Program or Anthropology Honors Program.

Credit Only Granted for. ANTH486 or ANTH476.

ANTH487 Honors Thesis (3-4 Credits)

Capstone course in which students write a thesis on the results of independent research into a current problem in anthropology. Prerequisite: ANTH486.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Anthropology department; and must be in Anthropology program; and must be admitted to University Honors Program or Anthropology Honors Program.
